title: DISSERTATIO LXIII — De Particula Experientia: The Standard Model of User Experience
description: A comprehensive particle physics framework for interaction quanta. This dissertation proposes a Standard Model of User Experience (SM-UX) — a complete mathematical framework describing the fundamental 'particles' of interaction, the 'forces' that bind them, and the 'fields' through which they propagate. Introduces 12 fundamental fermions (clickon, scrollon, emotiron, intentron, creativon...), 7 bosons including the Higgs Boson of Meaning, 4 fundamental forces (Strong Intent, Electromagnetic Attention, Weak Preference, Gravitational Habit), Maxwell's Equations of Attention, Feynman Diagrams of Interaction, CP Violation (negativity bias), SUSY-UX superpartner framework, and Dark Matter/Energy of unconscious interactions.
